column1: plot_num = unique ID for each plot in the experiment
consumers = presence of aboveground fungal pathogens and insect herbivores in a plot (2 levels); sprayed with fungicide and insecticide, unsprayed (i.e., control)
nutrients = nutrient supply to plots (2 levels); fertilized with NPK (10 g nutrients m-2 yr-1), unfertilized (i.e., control)
richness = initial richness of plots (2 levels); planted as either monocultures (1 species) or polycultures (5 species)
community_comp = one of 12 possible community compositions (6 monocultures; 6 5-species polycultures)
month = month of experiment in which measurements were taken (September 2012 - September 2015)
year_cont = year in which measurements were taken; 0 = 2012, 3 = 2015
tree_presence = status of trees in plot during each year; 0 = no trees present, 1 = at least one tree species present
rich_colherbs = number of colonizing herbaceous species present in a plot each year
pinus_presence = status of P. taeda in plot during each year; 0 = no P. taeda present, 1 = P. taeda present
